markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership and investment opportunities between HubSpot Ventures and growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai has developed an AI-powered content creation platform, combining service expertise with advanced workflows and AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [The company is experiencing rapid growth, projecting 12-50M ARR by year-end, and planning a Series B round in September](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [HubSpot Ventures expressed interest in potential co-investment, typically contributing $2-3M in Series B rounds](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Both parties see strong synergies and are eager to explore collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai Background and Evolution

  - [Marcel Santilli's journey: From IBM and HP to founding growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Key milestones: Security Intelligence at IBM, TechBeacon at HP, experiences at HashiCorp, ServiceNow, and Scalar](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Transition to AI-powered content creation: 24x traffic increase, 4x revenue growth at DeepRam](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [growthx.ai inception: Workshops led to service offerings, partnered with Dan (ex-IFTTT, Basecamp) as CTO](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### growthx.ai Technology and Platform

  - [AI Workflow Engine: Code-based workflows managed by AI agents, offering superior maintainability over low-code solutions](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Content OS: Comprehensive system for creating and managing content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Workflow IDE: In development, aiming for a "GitHub Copilot for workflows" experience](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Expert Layer and Learn Engine: Facilitating human interventions and continuous learning](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### Business Model and Growth

  - [Current focus: High-touch service model with selective client onboarding (2 per week)](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Notable clients: Webflow, Ramp, Reddit, SentinelOne, Okta, Diligent.com](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Revenue projection: 12-50M ARR by year-end (5x growth)](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Future plans: Gradual platform opening, starting with view-only access for clients](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

### Market Positioning and Competitive Landscape

  - [Unique value proposition: Not directly competing with agencies or tools](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Main alternative: In-house solutions using low-code tools](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Key differentiator: Combination of domain expertise and advanced AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Funding and Future Plans

  - [Recent funding: $12.5M raised (first external capital)](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Upcoming: Targeting Series B in September](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Focus areas: Completing expert layer and learn engine development](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Long-term vision: Expanding platform capabilities across multiple surface areas](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to send a follow-up in mid-August to plan for inbound week in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Explore potential face-to-face meeting during HubSpot's inbound event](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Continue discussions on possible Series B co-investment opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Investigate collaboration possibilities between HubSpot, HubSpot customers, and growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/JJMidLxxz3zt3CD7GxWAXN4oU4pR5FFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
